[[Category:Aelaki grammar]]

The '''quirky optative''' is a construction in [[Aelaki]] similar to the [[Quirky_jussive|quirky jussive]].

== Usage ==
It is used to express '''counterfactuals''' more than expressing a desire for something to be a certain way.

== Formation ==
[[Hodiernal]] tense is required for a counterfactual. The construction uses [[Pseudopronouns|pseudopronouns]] declined in [[Third_person|3rd person]], just like the quirky jussive.

== Examples ==
* Non-quirky [[Optative|optative]]: "I want to eat that cake" (desire for a real possibility)
* Quirky optative: "I wish I had a car" (counterfactual — the speaker does not have a car)

== See also ==
* [[Quirky_jussive]]
* [[Optative]]
* [[Hodiernal]]
* [[Pseudopronouns]]

[[Category:git synced pages]]
